---
name: Run the buddies scheme
about: To-do list for running the buddies scheme

---

- [ ] Run the buddies.R script
- [ ] Copy the Google Form and update for 3 months later
- [ ] Close the form for the pairings just matched
- [ ] Create an image for the next buddies run and save it as images/rainbowR-latest-buddies.png in the rainbowr.org repo
- [ ] Update https://rainbowr.org/buddies with new image and form link (link appears twice on that page)
- [ ] Update the date in the Buddies section of the rainbowR welcome email
- [ ] Set event in calendar to run next round
